llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Sales Manager PU - Footwear, Sports & Leisure 1
job.description: O bjecti v es of t h e P osi t ion To implement PU systems for Footwear,Sports Leisure, Performance Materials India sales. To implement marketing strategy in new business development Initiate, develop grow customer relationships with existing and potential customers. Execute PU system sales in Footwear,Sports Leisure develop business according to the country regional strategy and objectives. Provide input for account plans, and update them periodically Implement pricing strategy according to regional local strategic guidelines. Provide inputs for market intelligence. Strong collaboration with GKAMs. M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Sales Development : Understand customer needs, industry drivers, unique selling points deeply to recommend the best solutions, leading to the achievement of value creation for the customers and BASF. Formulate strategy to develop and implement segment, application, product and customer strategies to achieve sales targets. Conclude business contracts and maintain business growth at existing/potential customers. Explore, identify, and develop new businesses. Implement pricing strategy and support launch of new products at key customers. Provide accurate sales forecasting and regular feedback from time to time. Support new product development activities for customers, follow up and collaborate with lab team to ensure timely development/Customization of the products meeting customer requirement. Collaborate with respective team (local and regional technical Service, Supply Chain, Customer Service, Marketing, etc.) to provide prompt response related to quality, technical and application’s inquiries and other customer related queries. Responsible for managing margins at product and customer level, Identifying and managing channel partners, implement pricing policy, trading terms, rebates regularly to meet sales targets. Responsible to effectively manage distribution channel/partners. Coordinate with Global / Regional Key Account Management team to manage local activities with OEM’S and Tiers wherever required. Strategic Tasks and Implementation: Conduct studies and analysis on market trend, competitors, product applications and technology and provide appropriate market strategies. Develop key account management profiles wherever applicable. Monitors product, customer and segment profitability and initiate improvement opportunities.
